customer_anxiety_profile: Elliot's primary anxiety is transparency — he was burned by a prior solar company that withheld information about a rebate's tax treatment. He is not hostile to solar; he is specifically alert to companies that don't disclose the full picture. He will be watching for any moment where the closer hedges, omits, or oversells.
unresolved_concerns: Battery storage options beyond the Tesla Powerwall — Elliot asked directly and Holland acknowledged she didn't know the full lineup. The closer should be prepared to walk through all battery options explicitly.

Competitive context unknown — Elliot disclosed he is in four funnels simultaneously (04:36) but verify.prior_designs was never asked. The closer does not know whether Elliot has a competing design or quote in hand.

Wife not included in appointment — she is on the title (02:08) but the appointment was booked for Elliot alone. The closer should confirm at the start of the call whether the wife is available and, if not, address the co-decision-maker gap before proceeding.
sensitive_topics_raised: Prior solar company withheld rebate tax-treatment information — Elliot described this as a transparency failure that ended the deal. Any moment where the closer is less than fully explicit about costs, credits, or terms will trigger this memory.

Retired couple — cost value matters but no financial stress signals in the transcript. Elliot references international travel, a Tesla EV, and 19 years of homeownership without any cost-anxiety language.
exact_promises_rep_made: Appointment will be a phone call — Elliot should not be driving and should have a computer available so the specialist can email the design.
Holland will text appointment details after the call.
The specialist will have a conversation about battery storage options including the Tesla Powerwall.
closer_should_know: Elliot's deal-breaker is transparency — he walked away from a prior company specifically because they withheld information. Lead with full disclosure on every number, credit, and cost item. His wife is on the title and was not included in this appointment; confirm her availability at the top of the call before proceeding with the proposal.
